title: QUANTUM SYSTEMS BASED UPON GALOIS FIELDS — FROM SUB-QUANTUM TO SUPER-QUANTUM CORRELATIONS
author_string: CHANG, L. N., LEWIS, Z., MINIC, D., TAKEUCHI, T.
journal: International Journal of Modern Physics A
publisher: World Scientific Pub Co Pte Ltd
abstract: In this paper, we describe our recent work on discrete quantum theory based on Galois fields. In particular, we discuss how discrete quantum theory sheds new light on the foundations of quantum theory and we review an explicit model of super-quantum correlations we have constructed in this context. We also discuss the larger questions of the origins and foundations of quantum theory, as well as the relevance of super-quantum theory for the quantum theory of gravity.
